note: V11 Phase 2 — C13 finalises the activation height. V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT reduced from 10,000 to 7,100 in include/sost/params.h. Phase 1 (cASERT cascade + state-dependent dataset) ships at block 7,000; Phase 2 (SbPoW + PoP lottery + jackpot rollover) ships 100 blocks later at block 7,100, giving operators ~16-17h at the 600-second target between the two hard forks to observe Phase 1 behaviour, propagate the C11/C12 miner binaries across the pool and ANN the activation. Boundary tests (test_lottery_frequency, test_lottery_eligibility, test_lottery_rollover, test_coinbase_phase2) updated for the new heights: 7099 inactive, 7100 first triggered (bootstrap %3!=0, 7100%3==2), 7101 not triggered (%3==0), 7102 triggered (%3==1); 12099 last bootstrap not triggered (%3==0); 12100/12101 first permanent NOT triggered, 12102 first permanent triggered (%3==0). Banner section PHASE 2 BOX, slogan and conditional-activation text updated to block 7,100. Miner update path documented: MINERS MUST UPDATE node + miner binaries before block 7,100. Old miners will produce invalid coinbase on triggered Phase 2 blocks (CB11_LOTTERY_SHAPE) AND missing SbPoW signature (rejected by ValidateSbPoW). cap=5 per C9 Monte Carlo. Full protocol-side allocation redirected on triggered blocks. Phase 2 is NOT Sybil-proof. Pre-existing failures unchanged. See docs/V11_PHASE2_RELEASE_NOTES.md C13 section. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
